1.0.3.en: Add Korean translations for button press triggers

1.0.7.en: Refactor occupancy sensor flow conditions and triggers.

1.0.8.en: Add DALI level control capabilities and scene management features.

1.0.9.en: Enhance README files with detailed feature descriptions and device support.

1.0.10.en: Refactor DALI level handling in dimmable light and light group drivers.

1.1.0.en: Add fade time functionality for brightness and DALI level adjustments in dimmable light and light group drivers; implement new flow actions for setting brightness and DALI levels with fade time.

1.1.1.en: Update scene controller device name to include Korean translation for improved localization.

1.1.2.en: Add DALI controller support with new actions for setting group and light max levels

1.1.3.en: Update README to clarify DALIHub requirements.

1.2.0.en: Add MQTT real-time events, DT8 colour light driver, and fade time control

1.2.1.en: Fix startup crash in push-button and occupancy-sensor when MQTT events arrive before initialization

1.2.2.en: Update Node.js to 22 and fix device discovery to use deviceTypes array

1.2.3.en: Remove unused scene cards, update descriptions with DT8 support and installer link

1.2.4.en: Add brightness percentage action cards for lights and groups

1.2.5.en: Clarify UP/DOWN action card titles with DALI command names

1.2.6.en: Decode occupancy sensor events using IEC 62386-303 bitfields and add still_occupied/still_vacant flow conditions

1.3.0.en: Refactor event system, add illuminance capability and occupancy state enum, support push button double press and scheme 2   instance identification.

1.3.1.en: Add grouped occupancy conditions (Any Vacant / Any Occupied)

1.3.2.en: Fix HTTP port fallback, null safety, and input validation across drivers

1.3.3.en: Add external ON/OFF trigger flow cards and occupancy sensor enable/disable

1.3.4.en: Add Insights for dali_level and flow cards to enable/disable all occupancy sensors

1.3.5.en: Occupancy sensors now reset to vacant when disabled, fixing stale occupied state that could block vacancy-based triggers
